suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a branch in the skill for verification-only worker runs when assigned feature implementation already exists. The current skill assumes TDD workflow for all features, but some features are verification-only (no new code to write).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Worker session c3b8c628-32c3-460a-9868-1dfb470f715d (verify-api-live-data) correctly identified this was verification work and skipped TDD steps, but had to document deviation in skillFeedback.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the cross-tab settings synchronization pattern using window.dispatchEvent with custom event names. This pattern allows components to update immediately when settings change without page reload.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Worker session 5f3fa250-ebf0-4c5e-bd28-17dc64692b32 (settings-and-integration) implemented SETTINGS_UPDATED_EVENT pattern in src/lib/settings.ts, used by settings-form.tsx, roi-estimate-card.tsx, and app-header.tsx.

verify-api-live-data.notes: Verification feature completed successfully. No code changes required - purely runtime verification.
